## nsc auth login

Login to Namespace to access Namespace Instances, Remote Builders, etc.

```
nsc auth login [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --browser   Open a browser to login. (default true)
  -h, --help      help for login
```

### SEE ALSO

* [nsc auth](nsc_auth.md)	 - Authentication related operations (e.g. login).
